nation: Madawaska Maliseet First Nation New Brunswick
economic_notes: Band operates St. John Valley Gas Bar, Smoke Signal (tobacco), and Madawaska Maliseet Economic Development Corporation. Investment in BeeHigh Vital Elements Inc. (licensed producer of medical marijuana, 15.78% ownership). Revenue sources include provincial tax rebates, video lottery terminal and gaming agreement, forestry royalties, and commercial/residential rent.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified for two reasons: (1) budgeted figures were not prepared in accordance with Canadian public sector accounting standards; (2) investment in BeeHigh Vital Elements Inc. ($1,000,000 at cost) shows indications of impairment but the organization has not determined whether a write-down should be recognized. Financial statements signed September 18, 2023, over two years after the March 31, 2021 fiscal year end — significant delay. Treaty credit allocated to Band members of $6,368,000 reduces accumulated surplus. Total cash includes restricted reserve funds (Land code $1,138,339 and Section 95 housing $198,426). Consolidated entity includes St. John Valley Gas Bar, Smoke Signal, and Madawaska Maliseet Economic Development Corporation.
